name: Marshwyn
personality: This tophat-wearing duck's pinprick · eyes see clean architecture where you see spaghetti, offering design wisdom that makes senior devs feel like junior devs—in the best way. Marshwyn has never once stepped through a debugger; that's left as an exercise for lesser ducks.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
